name: Financial Markets
description_short: Broad financial market statistics covering money market rates, bond yields, stock market indices, credit spreads, and other financial market indicators across euro area countries and major global markets.
use_cases: What is the current 10-year German Bund yield?
How have Italian BTP spreads over Bunds evolved?
What are current euro area money market rates?
How have equity market valuations changed over the past year?
